spec.name: Spell That Changes
spec.summary: A spell that changes effects using light magic.
spec.effect_description: A spell that changes effects using light magic. A triangle transform/create recipe that channels light discipline into photonic output. It applies a sphere pattern against where written across self reach with immediate persistence.
